Title: The Weir
Synopsis: Big-screen adaptation of Conor McPherson's Olivier Award-winning play. Set in a remote pub in rural Ireland, four local men gather for their nightly pints; their routine is disrupted when a newcomer from Dublin is introduced, and stories of local folklore give way to a profound personal revelation.
Studio: Kate Horton Productions, Landmark Productions, Potboiler Productions, Copper Alley Productions, Screen Ireland, Curzon Film
Personnel: Dir: Conor McPherson. Cast: Brendan Gleeson, Owen McDonnell, Sean McGinley, Kate Phillips, Tom Vaughan-Lawlor. Producers: Kate Horton, Anne Clarke, Andrea Calderwood, Gail Egan, Lara Hickey. Exec Producers: Conor McPherson, Brendan Gleeson, Keith Potter (Screen Ireland), Philip Knatchbull & Louisa Dent (Curzon Film).
Source Title: Conor McPherson's 'The Weir' starring Brendan Gleeson starts filming for Curzon and Break Out Pictures

Title: No Way Off
Synopsis: Production underway in Northern Ireland. Set over one Christmas Eve night, exhausted single mother Nadya and her young child fall asleep on the bus home, then wake to find themselves abducted by the driver as the bus heads into the wilderness.
Studio: Stigma Films, Altitude (sales), Head Gear Films, Northern Ireland Screen, OnSight, Esme Grace
Personnel: Dir: Brian Kelly. Writer: Gaby Hull. Cast: Maria Bakalova, David Wilmot, Andrew Gower. Producer: Matthew James Wilkinson, Jamie Harvey. Exec Producer: Laura Rister.
Source Title: First look at Maria Bakalova in thriller 'No Way Off' with production underway
